testcase.name: assignShouldFailWhenOnlyFarmerUserIdProvided

testcase.name: assignShouldSucceedWithTaskIdAndExecutorId
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-01T04:17:34.138+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.mock.web.MockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-03-01T04:17:34.144+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-03-01T04:17:34.149+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 2 ms

testcase.name: assignShouldFailWhenExecutorIdMissing
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-01T04:17:34.438+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.mock.web.MockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-03-01T04:17:34.441+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-03-01T04:17:34.443+08:00 INFO 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 1 ms 2026-03-01T04:17:34.495+08:00 WARN 21136 --- [agri-system] [ main] l.a.a.c.e.GlobalExceptionHandler : 请求地址'/task/assign', 参数错误.
